paragraphs.source: Power prices misconception, PJM's poor market design, Capacity prices 9.3x growth, ERCOT vs PJM grid reliability and expansion
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: ### Power prices misconception, PJM's poor market design, Capacity prices 9.3x growth, ERCOT vs PJM grid reliability and expansion
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Power prices misconception, PJM's poor market design, Capacity prices 9.3x growth, ERCOT vs PJM grid reliability and expansion

pro.text: 电价成因误区，PJM糟糕的市场设计，容量电价暴涨9.3倍，ERCOT与PJM的电网可靠性及扩张对比

gemini_refined.text: 建议统一使用中文标点

default.text:
作者：Aishwarya Mahesh、Jeremie Eliahou Ontiveros、Ajey Pandey 及另外两人

电价误区、PJM 糟糕的市场设计、容量电价暴涨 9.3 倍、ERCOT 与 PJM 电网可靠性及扩容对比

manual.text: 电价误区、PJM（覆盖含新泽西州在内美国东部13个州的电网运营商）糟糕的市场设计、容量电价暴涨 9.3 倍、ERCOT（德克萨斯州电力可靠性委员会）与 PJM 电网可靠性及扩容对比

paragraphs.confirmed: 电价误区、PJM（覆盖含新泽西州在内美国东部13个州的电网运营商）糟糕的市场设计、容量电价暴涨 9.3 倍、ERCOT（德克萨斯州电力可靠性委员会）与 PJM 电网可靠性及扩容对比

applied_terms: Ensure 'capacity prices' is accurately translated (e.g., 容量电价) to distinguish it from general energy prices.
Maintain the authoritative, myth-busting tone of the thesis statement.

understanding.role_in_article: Establishes the core thesis that flawed capacity market designs, not AI datacenters, are causing power price spikes, setting the comparative framework between PJM and ERCOT.
understanding.relation_to_previous: N/A - This is the opening section.
understanding.relation_to_next: Lays the groundwork for addressing the specific mainstream misconception about AI datacenters detailed in the following section.
key_points: PJM's market design is fundamentally flawed, leading to a 9.3x growth in capacity prices.
The popular narrative blaming AI power demand is a misconception.
ERCOT serves as the proof point that grid reliability and expansion can be managed without price shocks.
translation_notes: Ensure 'capacity prices' is accurately translated (e.g., 容量电价) to distinguish it from general energy prices.
Maintain the authoritative, myth-busting tone of the thesis statement.

issues.description: 译文使用了“容量价格”，而本章翻译注意点中明确建议将“capacity prices”翻译为“容量电价”，以区别于一般电价（energy prices）。同时，“9.3倍的增长”略显平淡，可根据语境微调以体现暴涨的意味。
“电价误解”作为标题或摘要标签略显生硬，直译痕迹较重。

history.text: 电价误区、PJM 糟糕的市场设计、容量电价暴涨 9.3 倍、ERCOT 与 PJM 电网可靠性及扩容对比
